headline: MACC Investigation Into 1MDB Asset Recovery Reaches RM12 Billion
context: MACC reported cumulative 1MDB-related asset recovery of RM12 billion by February 2026 against estimated total losses of RM30 billion.

cards.big: 1MDB asset recovery reaches RM12 billion of estimated RM30 billion lost
cards.sub: Investigation entering 11th year with RM18 billion still unaccounted for

cards.big: Goldman Sachs settlement of USD3.9 billion in 2020 was largest single recovery
cards.sub: Former PM Najib conviction upheld but SRC International case is RM42 million of total

cards.big: Property seizures across 6 countries yielded RM2.8 billion in assets
cards.sub: Yacht Equanimity sold for USD126 million returned to Malaysian government

cards.big: Remaining RM18 billion involves assets in 12 jurisdictions with ongoing litigation
cards.sub: Some recovery blocked by sovereign immunity and statute of limitation issues

cards.big: 1MDB recovery tests whether accountability mechanisms can retrieve stolen public wealth
RM12 billion in 1MDB asset recovery. The investigation succeeds only if recovered assets reach public accounts.
